creator: dbaio@freebsd.org
text:
Hi.

Makefile needs some adjustments:
 - Python 3.5+ 
 - It requires py-selenium
 - psutil is really necessary at runtime?
 - Include python also in CATEGORIES 

It's necessary to improve pkg-descr.

Also there is a new version released, v3.0.2, could you update and test it, please?

https://github.com/mherrmann/selenium-python-helium/blob/master/setup.py

In what browser did you test it?

And thanks for your contribution.

Regards.
